nasb.text: Moses spoke to all the congregation of the sons of Israel, saying, “This is the thing which the Lord has commanded, saying,

esv.text: Moses said to all the congregation of the people of Israel, “This is the thing that the Lord has commanded.

cnv.text: 摩西告訴以色列全體會眾說：“耶和華吩咐的是這樣，他說：

ccb.text: 摩西对以色列全体会众说：“以下是耶和华给你们的吩咐。
